title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Samsung's Labor Unrest: Workers Demand Better Pay Amid AI Boom
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Samsung workers rally in South Korea, demanding higher pay, threatening to strike
description: PYEONGTAEK (South Korea), Apr 23:  Thousands of Samsung Electronics workers rallied Thursday at its computer chip complex in Pyeongtaek, South Korea, demanding higher bonuses and threatening to strike as booming demand for artificial intelligence drives up memory-chip profits. Holding signs and waving banners, the workers gathered at a factory compound amid a heavy police presence, shouting “make compensation transparent and remove maximum limits on bonuses!” Union officials said about 40,000 members participated in the protest. Police did not immediately provide […]

title: Samsung workers rally in South Korea, demanding higher pay and threatening to strike
description: Thousands of Samsung Electronics' workers have rallied at its computer chip making complex in Pyeongtaek, South Korea, demanding higher bonuses and threatening to strike as the boom in artificial intelligence drives up memory-chip profits. Samsung’s union, which represents about 74,000 workers, says the company has failed to offer adequate pay in line with its strong performance. It rejected the company's proposal for bonuses of restricted stock and called to remove caps on bonuses. The union has threatened to stage an 18-day walkout starting May 21 if negotiations with management fail. It says such an action would cost the company more than 1 trillion won ($676 million) a day.
